rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight leading-none

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY for premium feel. (Install @studio-freight/lenis)
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Images scale up slightly (scale-105) inside overflow-hidden containers. Buttons get a subtle bg color shift and icon translation.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered text reveal using framer-motion. Images fade in with slight upward parallax.

components_strategy.hero: Full screen (h-screen). Background should be an auto-play looping video with an overlay of bg-black/30. Text centered, huge H1. Booking widget overlaps the bottom edge.
components_strategy.booking_widget: Glassmorphism horizontal bar (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/40 shadow-xl) containing Shadcn DatePicker, Guest Select, and 'Check Availability' button.
components_strategy.property_carousel: Use Swiper, Embla (Shadcn), or Framer Motion. Cards must have portrait aspect ratio (aspect-[3/4]), with image darkening on hover and text sliding up.
components_strategy.why_choose_us: Bento grid layout. Not equal squares. Some tall, some wide. Very subtle 1px border border-[#E3DCD1], bg-white.
components_strategy.testimonials: Minimalist centered text slider. Massive quotation marks in #E3DCD1.
components_strategy.contact: Clean HTML/Tailwind form using Shadcn Input/Textarea. Fixed floating WhatsApp button at bottom right (green #25D366 or matched to brand #0D2B2C).

testing.required_attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, form submissions, and carousel arrows MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-book-now').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup @studio-freight/lenis for smooth scrolling. Wrap the main layout.

For the Hero Video, use an HTML5 <video> tag with autoplay muted loop playsinline. Source can be a stock tropical mp4 (e.g., 'https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2020/05/25/40141-424840842_large.mp4'), with the `hero_fallback_image` as the poster attribute.

Use Shadcn UI for the Date Picker, Select (for guests), and Buttons, but deeply customize them to match the Organic luxury theme (remove default Vercel border-radius and rings, replace with subtle #0D2B2C rings on focus).
In the Property Listings, ensure the image carousel uses Embla (Shadcn Carousel) or framer-motion.
Google Map embed should use a custom CSS filter to match the beige/teal aesthetic: filter: grayscale(80%) sepia(20%) hue-rotate(150deg).
Ensure the Book Now button is prominent in the sticky header and hero.
Import Cormorant Garamond and Outfit from Google Fonts in index.css or via next/font (if Next.js, otherwise standard standard HTML link). DO NOT use Inter for headings.
